frequency_analysis.description: How frequently today's numbers appeared in historical data

recency_analysis.description: How recently each number appeared before today

consecutive_appearance.description: Numbers that appeared in both today and the previous draw

patterns_observed: Number 14 appeared in consecutive draws (carry-over pattern)
lessons_learned: Consecutive appearance is possible - consider including 1-2 numbers from the previous draw
Today's draw had good balance: 3 low, 2 mid, 2 high - maintain range diversity
High-frequency numbers (appeared 9+ times) continue to be important
Numbers that appeared 3-7 draws ago can reappear - don't ignore moderately recent numbers
recommendations_for_next_draw: Consider including 14 in next predictions (appeared in consecutive draws)
Maintain range balance: aim for 2-3 numbers in each range (low/mid/high)
Don't over-rely on 'overdue' numbers - today's draw had mostly recent/moderate numbers
High-frequency numbers (6, 14, 20, 21) remain important but not exclusive
Consider numbers that appeared 3-7 draws ago as they can reappear
